databaseTree.tables: SELECT TOP $limit START AT ($offset + 1) STRING(user_name, '.', table_name) AS TableName FROM SYS.SYSTABLE LEFT JOIN SYS.SYSUSER ON creator = user_id WHERE table_type = 'BASE' AND user_name NOT IN ('SYS', 'dbo') ORDER BY user_name, table_name;
databaseTree.views: SELECT TOP $limit START AT ($offset + 1) STRING(vcreator, '.', viewname) AS ViewName FROM SYS.SYSVIEWS WHERE vcreator NOT IN ('SYS', 'dbo') ORDER BY vcreator, viewname;
databaseTree.procedures: SELECT TOP $limit START AT ($offset + 1) STRING(user_name, '.', proc_name) AS ProcedureName FROM SYS.SYSPROCEDURE LEFT JOIN SYS.SYSUSER ON creator = user_id WHERE user_name NOT IN ('SYS', 'dbo') ORDER BY user_name, proc_name;

databaseObject.view: SELECT viewtext AS Definition FROM SYS.SYSVIEWS WHERE STRING(vcreator, '.', viewname) = $qualifiedName
databaseObject.procedure: SELECT proc_defn AS Definition FROM SYS.SYSPROCEDURE p INNER JOIN SYS.SYSUSER u ON p.creator = u.user_id WHERE STRING(u.user_name, '.', p.proc_name) = $qualifiedName
